content:
Zip No. 482, "3×4 Rectangles" is now live: lnkd.in/zip! Share your thoughts and any tips for other players below. (Spoiler alert for anyone who hasn’t played, yet!)

Zip is a visual logic game where you need to plot a path through the grid while passing through each number in order. New editions drop daily — you can sign up to be alerted in your notification settings.

Comments should follow our Professional Community Policies, and content that may be spam or otherwise unprofessional may be removed.

http://lnkd.in/zip
